use_cases: Displaying premium subscription pricing tiers on landing pages
Highlighting high-tier product features with interactive hover states
Converting visitors with a tactile 'squishy' button interaction effect
Showcasing SaaS or digital product pricing with premium dark aesthetics
A/B testing different price points with animated attention-grabbing cards
ai_summary: An interactive pricing card component featuring smooth Framer Motion hover animations that create a tactile 'squishy' scaling effect. The card displays a subscription tier with Pro badge, large typography pricing, description text, and a CTA button with glass-morphism hover states. Dark-themed with backdrop blur effects, suitable for premium product pricing sections in SaaS, fintech, or subscription-based applications.
